title: Brazilian-club cross-reference can misclassify generic single-word club names
evidence: src/BrazilianSoccerMcp.Core/Services/PlayerQueryService.cs:58-62 documents that generic names ("Vitória", "Real", "Nacional", "Sport") shared between a Brazilian club and an unrelated foreign club may be matched as Brazilian.
suggestion: Disambiguate by country/state context when a base name is known to collide across leagues.

title: MCP Tools layer and Program.cs are not unit-tested
evidence: tests/BrazilianSoccerMcp.Tests/ has no *ToolsTests / Server / Program tests; all 41 tests target Core services. Tool wiring was only manually verified (see _agent_stdout.log).
suggestion: Add thin tests over the Tools static methods (they delegate to services) to lock the tool-to-service contract.

title: Line coverage is 85.9%, not complete
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.8594 (build+tests pass, defect_rate=1.0); ~14% of lines uncovered, concentrated in the Server/Tools and formatting paths.
suggestion: Cover ResponseFormatter edge cases and the Server tool entry points to raise coverage.
